items.claim: Conor McGregor's cardio is negatively impacted by the physical exertion of maintaining guard against a top-pressure fighter.
items.quote: it gets tiring being on bottom just maintaining your guard it doesn't look that tiring but it is and now he's getting dinged up

items.claim: Conor McGregor's fatigue levels in the Poirier fight were comparable to his previous performance against Chad Mendes.
items.quote: you can tell he's fatigued similar to like he was against Chad Mendes

items.claim: Conor McGregor has been inactive for five years.
items.quote: That was the last time he he's in there. 5 years.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has never competed at the 170 lb weight class.
items.quote: We've never seen him at 170 lb before.

items.claim: Max Holloway is more prepared for the 'big moment' of a fight than Conor McGregor due to recent activity.
items.quote: Max Holloway is. Max Holloway's been in there. He's ready to rumble. That's going to be the difference.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is currently 37 years old.
Conor McGregor's past aura of invincibility was a primary factor in his ability to intimidate opponents.
items.quote: his confidence and his his aura in there is what scared everybody.
